message:
✨ Upgrade LLM synthesizer to Claude Opus via Copilot API (#332)

Replace GPT-4o on GitHub Models with Claude Opus 4.6 via the GitHub
Copilot enterprise API endpoint. This produces dramatically higher
quality troubleshooting missions.

Key changes:
- 3-backend support: Copilot (Claude Opus) > Anthropic > GitHub Models
- Kill regex fallback that produced cookie-cutter garbage missions
- Stronger system prompt with explicit quality requirements
- Input cleaning: strip Codecov reports, PR templates, CI bot noise
- Banned generic step titles (e.g., "Understand the problem")
- Validation: minimum 3 steps, at least one with commands/code
- Better error logging for debugging CI failures

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-    console.log(`    [regex fallback] ${missionSteps.length} steps`)

+    console.log(`    [SKIP] LLM synthesis failed or skipped — not producing regex garbage`)
